name: Dog Pillow - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Add a touch of whimsy to your home with this delightful Dog Pillow from Bullseye's Playground. Crafted from soft polyester, this novelty plush pillow features a fun shape and a cozy brown hue, making it a charming addition to any indoor space. Measuring 10.5 inches in length and 14.75 inches in width, it's perfect for cuddling or adding a playful accent to your decor.
